title: frontend: EditorDialog: Warn when resource modified during edit
author: sudhidutta7694

findings.description: After a successful handleSave, resourceModifiedWarning is never explicitly cleared. The warning persists until manually closed even after a successful save. Consider calling setResourceModifiedWarning(false) inside handleSave after dispatching the clusterAction.
Pre-existing eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps on the applyFunc useCallback could be removed in a follow-up now that handleSave is properly memoized.
ResourceWatcher as a null-rendering child component is a clean pattern that avoids spurious WebSocket connections when the editor is not open.
Conflict detection correctly gates on four conditions covering edge cases for form-driven changes and read-only mode.
The new test covers the complete conflict scenario: user edits → external resourceVersion bump → alert appears and edits are preserved.
